channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Judge Dismisses Alberta Separatist Petition, Upholds First Nations Rights
item.description: A judge has overturned a petition advocating for Alberta's separation from Canada, ruling in favour of First Nations groups. The decision has elicited strong reactions from various political figures a...

item.title: Developers Report Skill Erosion and Frustration with AI-Assisted Coding
item.description: A growing number of software developers are expressing concern over their use of AI for coding, reporting that it often creates more work rather than saving time. According to a report by 404 Media, d...

item.title: Sanral to manage additional provincial roads amid funding and maintenance challenges
item.description: Since 2013, provincial governments have handed over more than 13,000km of roads to the South African National Roads Agency (Sanral) for management and maintenance. Transport Minister Barbara Creecy hi...

item.title: Elizabeth Montgomery’s Iconic Role as Samantha Stephens in “Bewitched”: A Photo Retrospective

item.title: Challenges and Strategies for Achieving Sustainable AI
item.description: AI sustainability is facing significant challenges as tech giants expand data centers powered largely by fossil fuels, despite earlier commitments to reduce emissions. Researcher Sasha Luccioni, a spe...

item.title: Police identify and apprehend suspect in Senate shooting incident

item.title: Chris Hayes criticizes Trump's $10 billion IRS lawsuit as potential conflict of interest
item.description: On May 13, 2026, MSNBC host Chris Hayes analyzed President Donald Trump's controversial $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS over the release of his tax returns. Hayes described the lawsuit as an unusu...

item.title: The Art and Legacy of Emilio Vilà: Iconic 1920s Posters and Illustrations
item.description: Emilio Vilà (1887–1967) was a Catalan painter and poster artist whose work became emblematic of the Art Deco and 'Années Folles' eras. Moving to Paris early in the 20th century, Vilà gained acclaim fo...

item.title: Tanzania Stock Exchange sees reduction in foreign investor withdrawals

item.title: Remembering Maria McCloy: Johannesburg’s Cultural Trailblazer
item.description: Maria McCloy, a central figure in Johannesburg’s cultural landscape, passed away on Tuesday 12 May 2026 at the age of 50 due to heart failure. McCloy was more than a publicist, DJ, fashion designer, w...
